query:
SELECT pt.external_id, pt.paid_at, pt.amount, pt.receipt_no, pt.status, pt.period_no, pt.sub_no,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS principal_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS interest_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS fee_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS discount_amount,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS overpaid_amount,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS close_installment_amount
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.contract_external_id = '10007'
ORDER BY pt.paid_at, pt.external_id
command:

  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS overpaid_amount,

FROM payment_transactions pt

ORDER BY pt.paid_at, pt.external_id
